Leadership
Visionaries & Speakers

Continuing to walk in the things we were taught, being rooted and grounded in our church bible doctrine.

Visionaries
Archbishop Prof. E.H. & Prof. Eunor Guti
Archbishop
Dr Joseph J. & Apostle Nyasha Miriam Guti
Guest Speakers
Archbishop E.Z. & Bishop Prisca Soko
Host Overseers & National Youth Directors
Dr B. & Evangelist R. Samundombe
About NYC 2026
Conference Details

A powerful gathering of youth and young adults from across South Africa — rooted in Kingdom legacy.

"Continuing to walk in the things we were taught, being rooted and grounded in our church bible doctrine in unity, love, prayer, forgiveness from the heart and in the genuine fear of God."
Philippians 4:9  ·  2 Timothy 3:14  ·  Proverbs 4:27
Event Details
ThemeKingdom Legacy "We Live It"
Dates09 – 12 July 2026
Venue30 Premier Street, Clayville
Olifantsfontein, Johannesburg
Closes30 June 2026 at 20:00
Late Fee+R50.00
Contact

Kingdom Partnership
Partnership Packages

This is more than just giving — this is Kingdom partnership. Every contribution matters. Every seed counts. Every burden bearer is part of what God is about to do!

Our National Target
R200 000 Must Fall
Young people, this is more than just giving — this is Kingdom partnership. Do NOT miss this opportunity!
🥉
Bronze Category
R500 – R999
Begin your Kingdom legacy. Every seed plants something eternal.
🥈
VIP Silver Category
R1 000 – R1 999
Step into greater impact as a silver Kingdom financier.
🥇
VIP Gold Category
R2 000 – R2 999
Gold partners carry the weight of Kingdom advancement.
🏅
VIP Platinum Package
R3 000 – R4 999
Platinum partners are rare, bold, and deeply Kingdom-minded.
💚
VIP Emerald Package
R5 000 – R9 999
Exceptional generosity, extraordinary eternal impact.
⭐
VVIP Black Package
R10 000+
The highest tier of Kingdom partnership. Your legacy will be remembered.

⚠️ Critical Deadlines
20 June 2026: Last day to place order & pay deposit
2 July 2026: Last day to settle full outstanding amount

General Members: Order via your Provincial Secretary.
Department Members: Order via your Departmental HOD.

✝
Every Member a Minister
Serve at NYC 2026

This is not just a conference you attend — it is one you help build. Every department is a calling. Every role is ministry.

🔥 Want to Join a Department?
Find the department where your gift fits and contact the heads directly.
Whether you love worship, serving, praying, organizing, or caring for people —
there is a place for you in building this Kingdom moment together.

REACH OUT · SHOW UP · SERVE WITH EXCELLENCE
